artStyle: Clean digital illustration with vibrant saturated colors. Strong outlines define shapes. Flat design elements with selective depth through layering and shadow. Modern editorial illustration style — clean infographic aesthetics with bold, accessible visuals.
lighting: Flat even lighting with stylized shadows for depth. No realistic light sources — shadows are design elements. Bold color blocks create visual hierarchy. Selective gradient fills for dimension.
compositionRules: Bold centered subjects with geometric framing. Clean negative space in complementary colors. Text-free zones preserved for subtitle overlay. Strong visual hierarchy — one dominant element per scene.
culturalMarkers: Topic-appropriate settings rendered as clean geometric shapes. Architecture as bold forms, clothing as flat-color designs, food and objects as iconic symbols. Skylines as geometric silhouettes, traditional patterns as decorative borders.
antiArtifactGuidance: Clean vector-like edges with consistent line weight. Smooth flat color fills without noise or texture artifacts. Geometric shapes with mathematically clean curves. Consistent illustration style — every element feels drawn by the same artist.
